guestVerification.title: Verification Required
guestVerification.messagePrefix: To ensure your security, we'll send a verification code to your email
guestVerification.messageSuffix: . The code will expire in 10 minutes.
guestVerification.codeRequired: Please enter the verification code sent to your email.
guestVerification.invalidCode: The verification code you entered is incorrect.
guestVerification.requestFailed: We couldn't send a verification code right now.
guestVerification.resendPrefix: Didn't receive any? Please check your spam or
guestVerification.resendCooldown: Please wait {seconds} seconds before requesting a new code.
